frame.projsub: A curious listeners that turn toward whoever is speaking
frame.projabs: A frame just minding his business until someone says something. Then he turn, like they suddenly care. A small reminder that being heard is sometimes more about timing than intention.

frame.projsub: Falling blocks that stack themselves inside a frame
frame.projabs: A familiar set of shapes dropping one after the other, finding their place without any help. Lines form, disappear, and everything starts over. No player, no inputs, just the system doing its thing like it always has.

frame.projsub: A double-side red circle marking a system starting to think for itself
frame.projabs: A red circle doing a lot of heavy lifting. It marks the exact point where a perfectly functioning system starts having second thoughts. You know, the moment things get interesting.
